suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit convention that ADR files live in docs/adrs/ (plural). ADR-001 was originally created in docs/adr/ (singular) and had to be migrated. Stating this convention explicitly would prevent future workers from repeating the singular/plural confusion.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature docs-foundation-adr-seed: ADR-001 was created in docs/adr/, later copied to docs/adrs/. CI script was patched to accept both paths. No explicit AGENTS.md convention states the canonical directory.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the allowlist-specific ADR section extensions. When an ADR is created to support an allowlist edge baseline (via check-allowlist-change-evidence.sh), it must include '## Why Needed' and '## Boundary Preserved' sections in addition to the standard template. The INDEX.md ADR template guidance should mention this variant.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature docs-foundation-adr-seed: ADR-001 includes extra sections ('Why Needed', 'Boundary Preserved') required by the allowlist evidence checker, but these are not documented in the INDEX.md template section that other ADR authors will follow.
